text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yo, Tickezo. Was that, like, for real for real?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You know, your math test. Way to leave your
garbage on the floor, by the way.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah, it was on the floor.
Seriously though, twenty-two percent?!
No cap?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know, right? But for real!
Our scores…
